_note: Per-channel Pass A keyword packs (2026-06-12, clipping-intelligence opportunity D). Mirrors streamer_prompts.json: filename_substrings are checked case-insensitively against the VOD basename, first matching channel wins. Matched packs EXTEND the base KEYWORD_SETS lists in stage4_moments.py (additive only — you cannot remove base keywords here). Categories must be one of: hype, funny, emotional, hot_take, storytime, reactive, dancing, controversial — unknown categories are skipped. Channel slang and recurring catchphrases are exactly what the generic lists can never carry; word-boundary matching applies to these too.

example_channel.description: Template — copy this block per streamer. Phrases are matched lowercase with word boundaries; prefer 2+ word phrases or unmistakable slang to keep precision.
